name: macOS Basic Navigation
description: Verifies core navigation: app launch → main window → settings sheet → MCP config → dismiss. Maps to testBasicNavigation, testNewChatFunctionality, testMacOSMenuBarCommands.

steps.description: Verify app launched and main window is visible with toolbar.
Open the Settings sheet via toolbar button.
Wait for settings sheet to appear.
Verify settings sheet is showing with Done button.
Wait for settings sheet to dismiss.
Verify settings sheet is fully dismissed.
